programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: PC Steve Crane takes an urgent phone call, and is shocked to discover Peter Pyke's warehouse has gone up in smoke. It soon emerges that the owner's wife had spent time behind bars for fraud, and her husband is reluctant to answer questions - leading Merton to suspect the blaze was deliberate. Meanwhile, Vernon moves into his new mansion, but has trouble keeping up with his well-to-do neighbours. Rural drama, starring James Carlton, Duncan Bell and Geoffrey Hughes(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An FBI agent crosses swords with Poirot while trying to retrieve the American Navy's top-secret plans for a new submarine, which have been stolen by a glamorous nightclub singer with a sideline in espionage. Drama, starring David Suchet(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuth is called to Gossington Hall by her old friend Dolly Bantry (Joanna Lumley) when she finds the corpse of an unknown blonde in the library of her home. It soon transpires that there is no shortage of suspects, including local bad boy Basil Blake (Ben Miller) and Dolly's husband Arthur (James Fox), but when the victim is identified as a dancer in line to inherit a fortune, enquiries take a different turn. Crime drama, starring Geraldine McEwan, with Simon Callow, Jack Davenport and Tara Fitzgerald(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A crackdown on an organised crime racket leads Foyle and Milner to a shipyard owned by the Talbot brothers, a duo with dubious links to a communist agitator who has recently moved to the area. When an engineer is murdered just hours after working at the shipyard, the detectives desperately try to track down the killer and discover the truth surrounding the Talbots' shady business dealings. Peter Capaldi guest stars in the wartime drama, with Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks(n)

programme.title: The Street
programme.desc: Well-respected teacher Brian Peterson is caught in an embarrassing situation by a girl while jogging in the park. Though he decides to put the incident behind him, he is recognised by the youngster during a parents' evening - sparking a police investigation into his behaviour, and prompting his life to unravel as secrets from his past are revealed. Drama, starring Neil Dudgeon and Lindsay Coulson(n)

programme.title: The Street
programme.desc: Premiership hopeful Billy Roberts risks his future at the top when he is caught stealing and is then expelled from the football academy where he trains. Despite being admired as an upstanding member of the community, his departure from training leads him astray, especially when a friend offers him an alternative means of making the money he needs. With Jody Latham and David Schofield(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Wealthy industrialist Sir Reuben Astwell is murdered after making a deal to sell synthetic rubber to the Germans, leaving the dapper sleuth wondering whether the motive was commercial or political. Evidence found in his chemical factory could hold the key to the mystery - but Poirot is unsure if the victim's widow can be trusted. Starring David Suchet, with Ann Bell and Bill Wallis(n)

programme.title: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: The family fears that Du Plessis is having a nervous breakdown when he starts to believe he is being haunted by the ghost of Peeters - and the visions drive him to make a confession to Caroline. Danny and Ed come to a rash decision during an animal rescue, endangering everything they have been working toward. African-set wildlife drama, starring Deon Stewardson, Hayley Mills, Stephen Tompkinson and Robert Bathurst(n)

programme.title: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: Danny is in prison, accused of murdering Peeters, but Du Plessis sets out to prove his friend's innocence - whatever the cost. Meanwhile, Ed's increasingly suspicious behaviour makes Du Plessis think he is harbouring a dark secret. With nobody around to help her, Rosie goes on a lone search for a wild cheetah, leading her into a dangerous situation(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan and Jack are chosen to go on a training course. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Bob Grant(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan and Jack are assigned by Blakey to take a class of rowdy schoolchildren on their annual outing. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Bob Grant(n)

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Feathers are ruffled among the staff as a new locum arrives at the hospital, while Ormerod treats the same boy twice in one day - but has difficulty acting on his own advice. Carnegie and Catherine struggle to shake off Ken and Alun during their first date at the races, until their full attention is claimed when a jockey falls from his horse on the track. Robert Cavanah and Amelia Curtis star(n)

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: The X-ray machine breaks down, and Carnegie has to tell the hospital staff they won't be getting a replacement - meaning patients will have to be taken elsewhere. Dr Makori gets a crash course in dealing with the locals as she struggles to treat a complex ailment, and a window cleaner is injured while beating a hasty retreat from his married girlfriend's bedroom(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A former bookie falls under suspicion for the murder of a hospital benefactor, who is found dead in his car. As the detectives investigate the case, it becomes clear their prime suspect had a strong motive, believing the victim was responsible for putting his daughter into a coma. Brian Cox guest stars, with John Thaw and Kevin Whately(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI Barnaby launches a murder investigation when the severed hand of a missing hotel manager is found by a dog. The dead man had recently been named in the will of the hotel owner, and solving the case takes on a renewed sense of urgency when fatal accidents start happening to the other beneficiaries. Mystery, guest starring Rosemary Leach and Samantha Bond, with John Nettles and Daniel Casey(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A horse whisperer disappears in Newton Magna, bringing Barnaby face to face with long-standing adversary Melvyn Stockard. The former convict's social climbing has paid dividends, sending him straight to the top of the village pecking order - and some believe his driving ambition makes him capable of foul play. Murder mystery, guest starring Larry Lamb (EastEnders, Gavin & Stacey), with John Nettles and Daniel Casey(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The bell-ringers of Midsomer Wellow are mysteriously murdered one by one - and it seems an ancient rhyme may hold the key to the killer's motive. As Barnaby and Troy embark on a baffling investigation in an attempt to determine the truth, Joyce starts digging into the past to discover the assassin's motives. John Nettles, Daniel Casey and Hugh Bonneville star(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A crackdown on an organised crime racket leads Foyle and Milner to a shipyard owned by the Talbot brothers, a duo with dubious links to a communist agitator who has recently moved to the area. When an engineer is murdered just hours after working at the shipyard, the detectives desperately try to track down the killer and discover the truth surrounding the Talbots' shady business dealings. Peter Capaldi guest stars in the wartime drama, with Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The life of an eccentric and reclusive couple comes under police scrutiny when a social services investigator is killed, and Barnaby must unearth generations of family secrets and decipher astronomical charts to find the murderer. Meanwhile, the detective's wife Sarah (Fiona Dolman, The Royal Today) arrives in Midsomer as the new head of a local school. Drama, starring Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes, with Phyllida Law, Edward Fox and Neil Pearson(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Morse investigates an assassination attempt at an international sporting event, but the case is very quickly closed. While Thursday is determined to walk away, Morse delves deeper, getting drawn into a web of intrigue involving espionage, big business and a dark secret in the heart of the Oxford community. Meanwhile, Thursday faces a moral dilemma as he tries to protect a woman from her violent husband(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The severed arm of a missing environmental health inspector is washed up on the shores of the Humber and Frost's investigation leads him to a local meat factory. Unfortunately, his new lodger's annoying dog keeps distracting him from the case. Starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, Emma Kay, Niall O'Brien and Tom Georgeson(n)

programme.title: The Syndicate
programme.desc: Bob is left reeling after the result of his brain scan, forcing him to re-evaluate his life and deal with problems that no amount of money can solve. But as he awaits a second opinion, his colleagues seek help on the internet and discover a possible cure overseas for their beloved manager. The brothers come under increasing pressure as the police investigation into the robbery continues, but while Jamie is convinced he is untouchable after his lottery win, Stuart is not so sure. Drama, starring Timothy Spall, Matthew McNulty and Matthew Lewis(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan and Jack tease Blakey about the obvious attention he is receiving from the canteen girl(n)

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: A patient who set fire to his own shop (guest star Tony Slattery) attempts to avoid police questioning by leaping into an ambulance and driving off towards the pier - unaware Alun and a sick man are in the back of the vehicle. Meanwhile, Dr Makori fears for her relationship with Dr Fox when he tells her he has been offered a job in Biafra. Medical drama, with Andy Wear, Paul Fox and Kananu Kirimi(n)

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: A wedding reception held on Elsinby Pier ends in tragedy when a fishing trawler sails badly off course. Meanwhile, Adam faces up to a tough decision and the staff at the hospital prepare for a new arrival as Jill goes into labour. Robert Cavanah and Amy Robbins star(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Oscar finds himself in an awkward position when the police investigate a warehouse robbery. A lost property clear-out at the police station gives David a new hobby, but he soon manages to cause trouble. Starring Derek Fowlds and David Lonsdale(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Merton investigates a suspicious death with the help of CID and Walker begins to suspect a poacher may be involved. Vernon tempts fate by employing a new mechanic for the garage without asking Bernie and attempts to recreate a traditional dance at the town fete. Guest starring Hannah Gordon(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A pupil at the prestigious Devington School dies of a stab wound while competing in a race in honour of his recently deceased grandfather. DCI Barnaby discovers the death could be linked to a long-running rivalry between the school and the locals - or to the youngster's membership of an elite club dedicated to dining on suet puddings. Mystery, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey and Jane Wymark(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A prominent resident is robbed and battered to death with her walking stick, and suspicion soon falls on the members of her reading club - which turns out to be a front for a lucrative investment portfolio. John Nettles and Daniel Casey star, with guest appearances by Anton Rodgers (Fresh Fields) and Angela Thorne (To the Manor Born)(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: An opera singer is shot by a sniper at an Oxford University ceremony just as she is about to receive an honorary degree. Morse is a big fan of her work and thinks she could not possibly be involved in anything untoward, but his investigations turn up more than a few sordid secrets. Detective drama, starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Robert Hardy, Sheila Gish, John Gielgud and Rachel Weisz(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: As the sole witness to a dying man's last words, Bobby Attfield is determined to solve the riddle they present, and forms an unlikely alliance with socialite Frankie Derwent and visiting family friend Miss Marple to help him on his quest. A trail of clues leads them to Castle Savage, where they uncover a hotbed of stifled emotion, treachery and deceit among its strange inhabitants. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, with a supporting cast that includes Sean Biggerstaff, Samantha Bond, Richard Briers, Rafe Spall, Warren Clarke, Mark Williams, Georgia Moffett, Helen Lederer and Rik Mayall(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuth is called to Gossington Hall by her old friend Dolly Bantry (Joanna Lumley) when she finds the corpse of an unknown blonde in the library of her home. Crime drama, starring Geraldine McEwan, with Simon Callow, Jack Davenport and Tara Fitzgerald(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The local gossips go to town when a naked and mutilated corpse is discovered in the middle of a crop circle. However, their lurid tales of extraterrestrial abduction soon take a turn for the macabre when more similarly injured cadavers are discovered, causing DCI Barnaby to question his down-to-earth approach. Murder mystery, starring John Nettles(n)

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon makes plans to take Tracey and Dorien on a madcap 1970s-themed weekender, but Tracey is about to receive some eye-opening news that could spoil her fun. First of a two-part episode of the comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph(n)

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: As Tracey awaits the results of her scan, she and Sharon swap home truths in the comfort of a spa, and try to make plans for the future, while Dorien prepares to say a long goodbye to her daughter Naomi. Second of a two-part episode of the comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph, with Frances Ruffelle and Michael Lumsden(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A horse whisperer disappears in Newton Magna, bringing Barnaby face to face with long-standing adversary Melvyn Stockard. The former convict's social climbing has paid dividends, sending him straight to the top of the village pecking order - and some believe his driving ambition makes him capable of foul play. Murder mystery, guest starring Larry Lamb (EastEnders, Gavin & Stacey), with John Nettles and Daniel Casey(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The bell-ringers of Midsomer Wellow are mysteriously murdered one by one - and it seems an ancient rhyme may hold the key to the killer's motive. As Barnaby and Troy embark on a baffling investigation in an attempt to determine the truth, Joyce starts digging into the past to discover the assassin's motives. John Nettles, Daniel Casey and Hugh Bonneville star(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A crackdown on an organised crime racket leads Foyle and Milner to a shipyard owned by the Talbot brothers, a duo with dubious links to a communist agitator who has recently moved to the area. When an engineer is murdered just hours after working at the shipyard, the detectives desperately try to track down the killer and discover the truth surrounding the Talbots' shady business dealings. Peter Capaldi guest stars in the wartime drama, with Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The life of an eccentric and reclusive couple comes under police scrutiny when a social services investigator is killed, and Barnaby must unearth generations of family secrets and decipher astronomical charts to find the murderer. Meanwhile, the detective's wife Sarah (Fiona Dolman, The Royal Today) arrives in Midsomer as the new head of a local school. Drama, starring Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes, with Phyllida Law, Edward Fox and Neil Pearson(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Morse investigates an assassination attempt at an international sporting event, but the case is very quickly closed. While Thursday is determined to walk away, Morse delves deeper, getting drawn into a web of intrigue involving espionage, big business and a dark secret in the heart of the Oxford community. Meanwhile, Thursday faces a moral dilemma as he tries to protect a woman from her violent husband(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The severed arm of a missing environmental health inspector is washed up on the shores of the Humber and Frost's investigation leads him to a local meat factory. Unfortunately, his new lodger's annoying dog keeps distracting him from the case. Starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, Emma Kay, Niall O'Brien and Tom Georgeson(n)

programme.title: The Syndicate
programme.desc: Bob is left reeling after the result of his brain scan, forcing him to re-evaluate his life and deal with problems that no amount of money can solve. But as he awaits a second opinion, his colleagues seek help on the internet and discover a possible cure overseas for their beloved manager. The brothers come under increasing pressure as the police investigation into the robbery continues, but while Jamie is convinced he is untouchable after his lottery win, Stuart is not so sure. Drama, starring Timothy Spall, Matthew McNulty and Matthew Lewis(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan and Jack tease Blakey about the obvious attention he is receiving from the canteen girl(n)

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: A patient who set fire to his own shop (guest star Tony Slattery) attempts to avoid police questioning by leaping into an ambulance and driving off towards the pier - unaware Alun and a sick man are in the back of the vehicle. Meanwhile, Dr Makori fears for her relationship with Dr Fox when he tells her he has been offered a job in Biafra. Medical drama, with Andy Wear, Paul Fox and Kananu Kirimi(n)

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: A wedding reception held on Elsinby Pier ends in tragedy when a fishing trawler sails badly off course. Meanwhile, Adam faces up to a tough decision and the staff at the hospital prepare for a new arrival as Jill goes into labour. Robert Cavanah and Amy Robbins star(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Oscar finds himself in an awkward position when the police investigate a warehouse robbery. A lost property clear-out at the police station gives David a new hobby, but he soon manages to cause trouble. Starring Derek Fowlds and David Lonsdale(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Merton investigates a suspicious death with the help of CID and Walker begins to suspect a poacher may be involved. Vernon tempts fate by employing a new mechanic for the garage without asking Bernie and attempts to recreate a traditional dance at the town fete. Guest starring Hannah Gordon(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A pupil at the prestigious Devington School dies of a stab wound while competing in a race in honour of his recently deceased grandfather. DCI Barnaby discovers the death could be linked to a long-running rivalry between the school and the locals - or to the youngster's membership of an elite club dedicated to dining on suet puddings. Mystery, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey and Jane Wymark(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A prominent resident is robbed and battered to death with her walking stick, and suspicion soon falls on the members of her reading club - which turns out to be a front for a lucrative investment portfolio. John Nettles and Daniel Casey star, with guest appearances by Anton Rodgers (Fresh Fields) and Angela Thorne (To the Manor Born)(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: An opera singer is shot by a sniper at an Oxford University ceremony just as she is about to receive an honorary degree. Morse is a big fan of her work and thinks she could not possibly be involved in anything untoward, but his investigations turn up more than a few sordid secrets. Detective drama, starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Robert Hardy, Sheila Gish, John Gielgud and Rachel Weisz(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: As the sole witness to a dying man's last words, Bobby Attfield is determined to solve the riddle they present, and forms an unlikely alliance with socialite Frankie Derwent and visiting family friend Miss Marple to help him on his quest. A trail of clues leads them to Castle Savage, where they uncover a hotbed of stifled emotion, treachery and deceit among its strange inhabitants. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, with a supporting cast that includes Sean Biggerstaff, Samantha Bond, Richard Briers, Rafe Spall, Warren Clarke, Mark Williams, Georgia Moffett, Helen Lederer and Rik Mayall(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuth is called to Gossington Hall by her old friend Dolly Bantry (Joanna Lumley) when she finds the corpse of an unknown blonde in the library of her home. It soon transpires that there is no shortage of suspects, including local bad boy Basil Blake (Ben Miller) and Dolly's husband Arthur (James Fox), but when the victim is identified as a dancer in line to inherit a fortune, enquiries take a different turn. Crime drama, starring Geraldine McEwan, with Simon Callow, Jack Davenport and Tara Fitzgerald(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The local gossips go to town when a naked and mutilated corpse is discovered in the middle of a crop circle. However, their lurid tales of extraterrestrial abduction soon take a turn for the macabre when more similarly injured cadavers are discovered, causing DCI Barnaby to question his down-to-earth approach. Murder mystery, starring John Nettles(n)

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: Norman's diary logging his private thoughts is discovered by the other patients - who fail to appreciate what they read. Christopher Strauli stars(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar rescues a Russian damsel in distress and agrees to help her fend off art thieves eager to get their hands on her da Vinci masterpieces. Cult adventure series, starring Roger Moore(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo investigates when a woman is shot and the killer tries to steal her ring - which turns out to have come from an unsolved heist. A trap is set for the mobster behind the theft(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: Part two of two. As the hotel deaths mount, Quincy faces a race against time to find the culprit before the Mob make their move. The guests are anxious to get out of the building, but Quincy and his colleagues know they have to keep the disease, and the visitors, contained if they hope to avoid an epidemic. Jack Klugman stars(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Crooked property tycoon Ted Standen goes back on his word following the release from prison of his former business partner Alex Rowan. The vengeful ex-associate begins orchestrating attacks on Ted and his son John, and Terry is called upon to protect the youngster. Gareth Hunt and Alfie Bass guest star, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A surprising connection emerges when Haskins is framed for corruption, while Regan and Carter investigate a spate of break-ins. Police drama series, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Cowley and the team present a line of defence against groups of mercenaries and guerrillas who are waging war on the streets of Britain. David Suchet and Geoffrey Palmer guest star alongside Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Nightclub owner Paul Verrier is tricked into believing that the Saint is trying to kill him, so contacts various people to murder Templer. One of his nefarious contacts is unknown to him visually, so when the Saint eventually pays a call Verrier mistakes him for his hired assassin and inadvertently hires the Saint to kill himself. Roger Moore stars(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A serial killer who was never caught appears to have struck again when a woman is found strangled - but Theo is not about to let the murderer escape justice for a second time(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: When a man is killed in a hit-and-run outside Danny's bar, the medical examiner discovers the woman believed to be driving the vehicle was a friend of his current partner Jenny. Drama, starring Jack Klugman and Val Bisoglio(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur does a profitable deal on a fireplace and Terry has to mind a dodgy bookie, putting a damper on his blossoming romance with latest girlfriend Dolly. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie is captured and held hostage in a vicarage by four German terrorists - and as time runs out, he finds himself forced to make a deal with them before anyone gets hurt. Gabrielle Drake guest stars, with Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A villain comes out of hiding in an attempt to retrieve stolen loot and only Regan and Carter can stop him. Police drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: Caravanning with Shane Richie
programme.desc: The former Pontins bluecoat takes on a mission to persuade friends, family and the great British public about the great fun to be had at caravan parks in Britain. Here, the actor and presenter heads to Rhyl, north Wales, where he and his extended family accept accommodation in three static caravans. The EastEnders star then tries to win them all over to this type of holiday, highlighting attractions such as classic bingo at the entertainment complex and rounders on the beach. They then visit Blaenau Ffestiniog to zipline over a slate quarry, where even the grandparents take on the challenge(n)

He assists a warrior who has turned against the tyrant, and liberates five women who have been forced to become his brides. Together, they make a desperate journey through the desert to salvation, with their enemies in hot pursuit. Reboot of the sci-fi thriller franchise, starring Tom Hardy and Charlize Theron(n)

programme.title: Then & Now
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the history of the river, and how it has played a pivotal role in London's development as a major centre for international trade. This episode focuses on the capital's docklands, which at their peak, employed more than 30,000 workers. A boat captain whose family have hauled cargo along the river for six generations recalls his grandfather's unique talents. Plus, a look at the construction of bridges, sewers, and the flood barrier(n)

He examines the history of HMS Endeavour and looks at James Cook's two missions in charge of the Royal Navy research vessel, taking in the observation of the 1769 transit of Venus and his voyage to Australia the following year(n)

programme.title: Ancient Mysteries
programme.desc: Documentary examining the 2017 discovery of underwater ruins along the Tunisian coast that were once a vital Roman outpost, known as Neapolis. Evidence suggests that the metropolis was not completely destroyed, and that its inhabitants attempted to rebuild the city, but a geological phenomenon called liquefaction doomed these efforts. As the land under the city turned into quicksand, the harbour was gradually submerged. Now, more than a millennium since it disappeared, this new discovery is restoring Neapolis's reputation as a jewel in the crown of the Roman Empire(n)

programme.title: The Commuter (2018)
programme.desc: Michael MacCauley, an insurance salesman and former police officer, finds himself caught up in a conspiracy during his commute home. After receiving a phone call from a mysterious stranger, Michael is forced to go undercover to save the lives of the other passengers on the train. Thriller, starring Liam Neeson, Vera Farmiga and Patrick Wilson(n)

programme.title: The Last Frontier (1955)
programme.desc: A backwoods trapper signs up as a cavalry scout at a fort manned by inexperienced soldiers, where he falls in love with a colonel's wife. On taking over command of the garrison, the officer plans to lead his men in a reckless attack on a hostile Indian tribe - and it is down to the frontiersman to save his comrades from a massacre. Western, starring Victor Mature, Robert Preston and Anne Bancroft(n)

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter (1971)
programme.desc: A slick conman tries to pass his dim-witted sidekick off as a notorious gunslinger as a way of profiting from a dispute between rival companies in a small mining town. Comedy Western, starring James Garner, Jack Elam, Suzanne Pleshette, Harry Morgan and Chuck Connors(n)

programme.title: The Last Wagon (1956)
programme.desc: A mixed-race renegade is convicted for the murder of his wife's killers and transported to prison in a wagon train. When the party is attacked by Apaches, the only survivors are the prisoner and a group of orphaned children, so he takes responsibility for leading them to safety. Western, with Richard Widmark, Felicia Farr, Ray Stricklyn and Susan Kohner(n)

programme.title: Carry On Cleo (1964)
programme.desc: A captured Briton is mistaken for a heroic swordsman and promoted to the Roman Royal Guard, with orders to protect Julius Caesar. But the last thing he and the fated emperor expect is an assassination attempt from within Caesar's own circle of friends. Comedy, starring Amanda Barrie, Kenneth Williams, Sid James, Kenneth Connor, Jim Dale, Charles Hawtrey and Joan Sims(n)

programme.title: The Imitation Game (2014)
programme.desc: Biopic of mathematician Alan Turing, whose work during the Second World War translated seemingly unbreakable Nazi codes as well as pioneering the development of computer technology. In the years following the war, his life would be destroyed as his homosexuality was discovered, leaving him facing criminal charges. Starring Benedict Cumberbatch, Keira Knightley and Charles Dance(n)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol (2011)
programme.desc: Secret agent Ethan Hunt and his team are implicated in a bombing at the Kremlin, forcing the American president to declare them fugitives. The spies plan to clear their name by abducting the real terrorist, which leads them into a pursuit around the globe. However, Hunt cannot be sure his colleagues are trustworthy. Action adventure sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Simon Pegg and Paula Patton(n)

programme.title: Sexy Beast (2000)
programme.desc: A retired safe-breaker enjoying the high life in Spain becomes the target of unwanted attention when his psychotic former gangland boss comes looking to enlist his help and expertise for a major bank robbery in London. Crime thriller, starring Ray Winstone, Ben Kingsley, Ian McShane and Amanda Redman(n)

programme.title: The Other Side of the Door (2016)
programme.desc: A grieving mother living in India learns of a temple that contains a mysterious portal, through which she would be able to speak to her dead son one last time. She disobeys instructions not to open the portal fully, and disrupts the balance between life and death as the boy's dangerous spirit is unleashed into the world - and worse besides. Horror, starring Sarah Wayne Callies and Jeremy Sisto(n)

programme.title: Ice Age: The Meltdown (2006)
programme.desc: Sid the sloth, Manny the mammoth and Diego the sabre-toothed tiger grimly realise the good life is about to come to an abrupt end as flood waters threaten their homes. However, a vulture suggests they could turn an old giant tree into a boat and make their escape, so the three friends set off in search of it. Animated adventure sequel, with the voices of Ray Romano, John Leguizamo and Denis Leary(n)

programme.title: Small Soldiers (1998)
programme.desc: A hi-tech computer chip has a bizarre effect on a squad of toy soldiers, causing mayhem for their owner as the miniature marauders engage in a series of scaled-down skirmishes. Children's adventure mixing live action and computer animation, starring Kirsten Dunst, Denis Leary and Gregory Smith, with the voices of Tommy Lee Jones, Frank Langella, Sarah Michelle Gellar and Christina Ricci(n)

programme.title: Dr Dolittle 2 (2001)
programme.desc: The vet with a talent for talking to animals comes to the aid of forest creatures that need his help protecting their homes from land developers. He also has to deal with the love life of a circus bear that has fallen for a wild female. Comedy sequel, starring Eddie Murphy and Kevin Pollak, with the voices of Steve Zahn, Lisa Kudrow and Isaac Hayes(n)

programme.title: Paddington (2014)
programme.desc: An earthquake forces a bear from the Peruvian jungle to start a new life in London. He finds modern Britain to be very different from the stories told to him by his aunt, but makes a new home with a kindly family. However, a sinister taxidermist intends to turn him into a museum exhibit. Comedy based on Michael Bond's series of children's books, starring Hugh Bonneville, Sally Hawkins and Nicole Kidman, with the voice of Ben Whishaw(n)

programme.title: The Day Shall Come Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Chris Morris and stars Marchant Davis and Kayvan Novak talk about making their new 'comedy with consequences'(n)

programme.title: Now You See Me (2013)
programme.desc: Four magicians use their lavish stage shows as cover for a series of seemingly impossible heists, and give away the money they steal to their audiences. An FBI agent assembles a team of experts to discover how the baffling robberies are committed and what the secret agenda behind the crime spree is. Crime thriller, starring Jesse Eisenberg, Mark Ruffalo, Woody Harrelson and Isla Fisher(n)

programme.title: Joker Interview Special
programme.desc: Star Joaquin Phoenix and writer and director Todd Phillips discuss the making of their dark dramatic take on the origin of the famous comic-book villain(n)

programme.title: Spy (2015)
programme.desc: A deskbound CIA agent provides valuable background support for a dashing secret agent, but has never gone into action herself. Everything changes, when the spy mysteriously vanishes, and she leaps into action to take his place, infiltrating the inner circle of a ruthless arms dealer and trying to avert a global catastrophe. Comedy adventure, starring Melissa McCarthy, Jason Statham and Rose Byrne(n)

programme.title: Byzantium (2012)
programme.desc: Two female vampires spend centuries on the run from an order of their own kind, who object to women becoming undead. They hide out in a seaside town, where one uses a brothel as a means to find men to feed on, while the other forms a bond with a terminally ill boy - but their past soon catches up with them. Horror, starring Gemma Arterton, Saoirse Ronan and Jonny Lee Miller(n)

programme.title: Stoker (2013)
programme.desc: A teenager living an isolated life in her mother's remote estate discovers she has an uncle she has never met following her father's death. The mysterious relative moves into the house and seems to take over his brother's role in the family. His niece suspects he has sinister motives, but becomes dangerously infatuated with him. Thriller, starring Mia Wasikowska, Nicole Kidman and Matthew Goode(n)

programme.title: Coneheads (1993)
programme.desc: An alien couple and their daughter crash-land on Earth and try to blend into suburban society, all the while dodging the immigration authorities and their increasingly suspicious neighbours. Comedy, starring Dan Aykroyd, Jane Curtin, Michael McKean, Jason Alexander, Michelle Burke, David Spade and Chris Farley(n)

programme.title: Carry On Cabby (1963)
programme.desc: The neglected wife of a workaholic taxi owner grows increasingly tired of his lack of interest in their marriage. In a ploy to bring him to his senses, she secretly launches a rival cab firm with a driver roster made up of attractive women, who soon tempt his customers away. Comedy, starring Sid James, Hattie Jacques, Kenneth Connor and Charles Hawtrey(n)

programme.title: The Day Shall Come Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Chris Morris and stars Marchant Davis and Kayvan Novak talk about making their new 'comedy with consequences'(n)

programme.title: Horton Hears a Who! (2008)
programme.desc: A kindly elephant hears a cry of help coming from a speck of dust and discovers the minuscule city of Whoville. As he tries to help its citizens, the other animals begin to question his sanity, and the evil Kangaroo incites them to turn against the do-gooder. Animated adaptation of Dr Seuss's book, with the voices of Jim Carrey, Steve Carell, Carol Burnett, Seth Rogen and Will Arnett(n)

programme.title: Night at the Museum: Battle of the Smithsonian (2009)
programme.desc: The living exhibits at New York's Museum of Natural History are shipped to Washington's Smithsonian Institution - along with the artefact that brought them to life in the first place. Nightwatchman Larry tries to retrieve it, only to find the contents of the world's largest museum have been reanimated, including a pharaoh determined to take over the world. Fantasy comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller, Amy Adams, Owen Wilson and Steve Coogan(n)

programme.title: Last Vegas (2013)

He and three friends decide to mark the occasion by reliving their wild youth with a trip to Las Vegas - but they find that both the city and each other have changed since their glory days. Comedy, starring Michael Douglas, Robert De Niro, Morgan Freeman and Kevin Kline(n)

programme.title: T2 Trainspotting Interview Special

programme.title: Sleepless (2017)

Downs is keen to return the drugs and see his son set free, but is hampered by having to dodge the attentions of an internal affairs officer. Action thriller, starring Jamie Foxx, Dermot Mulroney and Michelle Monaghan(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel gets back in touch with a childhood friend, and as things progress romantically, Joe fears they could actually be relatives. Meanwhile, Lennox faces a moral dilemma when she discovers that her blog's new sponsor participates in unethical labour practices. Guest starring Trevor Donovan(n)

programme.desc: With Riley's baby due any time, she is confined to the sofa under doctor's orders not to exert herself. Tucker tries to help Danny decide what to buy Riley as a 'push gift'. programme.desc: Jeffords' favourite author, DC Parlov, gets in touch after his latest manuscript is stolen, so Jeffords and Peralta convince Diaz to go undercover with them at a fantasy fiction convention to find the culprit. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard is put in charge of looking after Stephen Hawking's wheelchair when the famous scientist comes to lecture at the university for a week - and takes advantage of his position to blackmail Sheldon into performing assorted unpleasant tasks. Guest starring Stephen Hawking(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy's attempts to celebrate her birthday with an intimate night at home are interrupted by the news that Bernadette has gone into labour. programme.title: Back to the Future Part III (1990)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Party-loving Jake plans his wedding to image-conscious bride-to-be Rosie, who dreams of a more intimate affair(n)

programme.title: Rob Beckett's Savage Socials

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson guides two more singletons on the dating show based naked attraction alone. First into the studio is 26-year-old Adele from Scotland. After beating cancer, Adele wants to live life to the full and find a guy who feels the same. She is followed by 22-year-old Jack from Manchester. After a dramatic four-stone weight-loss, Jack wants to show off his new body and attract the one for him(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Raj organise a stag party for Howard, but stories about his sexual history are unwittingly revealed, and he has to persuade bride-to-be Bernadette not to call off the wedding. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The culinary contest arrives in Hull as five more diners hope to claim the grand prize of £1,000. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Wrestling promoter and novice cook James hosts the second night in Hull, and he hopes to wow his guests with a Mexican-themed party complete with a wrestling match as the evening's entertainment. However, his costume requirements, and his spicy food, may be too much for some of the attendees(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Wedding stationery entrepreneur Katrena hosts the third dinner party in Hull, and hopes to impress her guests with a cruise-ship-themed night featuring a pink strawberry soup starter, a sparkling lemon iceberg dessert and towel-folding entertainment(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mum-of-three Natalie hopes that her choice of good quality produce can help her to impress her guests on the fourth night of the competition in Hull, East Yorkshire. However, the evening does not get off to the best start when community manager George wrongly guesses that she is the grandmother of her two-year-old daughter, and entrepreneur Katrena is insulted by one of the host's questions(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final dinner party in Hull and the turn of community manager George to entertain the guests. Having spent the week heavily criticising everyone else's cooking, the host faces great scrutiny with his menu of simple yet tasty favourites. programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit a military vehicle enthusiast, where Henry mirror polishes a decommissioned missile and Simon repurposes a tank turret(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Florence and Nadine, two of Chester's Grevy's zebras, are about to give birth, but other animals are struggling to produce offspring, including Iblis the Asiatic lion. Meanwhile, warthog dad Magnum is feeling the pressure of parenting as two of his older children, Dobby and Neville, are becoming increasingly hard to control, and Magnum is losing his hair with the stress(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Pioneering veterinary surgeon Noel Fitzpatrick gets to work on more animals in need of his help. A puppy is rushed into the surgery after being hit by a car, leading to a series of operations including a skin graft in which the dog's leg is sewn into her stomach. A Great Dane requires high-risk surgery after being diagnosed with a cancerous tumour in its leg, and a Chihuahua has shattered the bones in its paw falling down the stairs while chasing a cat. programme.desc: Becky, 59, is rushed in after a suspected stroke, and medics are concerned she may have had a bleed on the brain. Georgia, 19, locked herself out of her flat and lost her balance trying to climb through a second-floor window, falling 20ft on to concrete. programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

While Nikki, who was driving, is sent for a CT scan with suspected internal injuries, Angela is treated for head wounds and a dislocated elbow. programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Florence and Nadine, two of Chester's Grevy's zebras, are about to give birth, but other animals are struggling to produce offspring, including Iblis the Asiatic lion. programme.desc: Adrian Simpson meets Colin and Veronica Moore, who want a holiday home in St Lucia where they can escape the British winters, so he searches the Caribbean island for properties on a budget of £200,000(n)

Jacqui is overwhelmed by the luxury and extras in the rooms, which raises questions about how the owners make a profit. programme.desc: The final stopover is at Patrick Duggan's Beatles-themed Epstein House in Liverpool, the former home of band manager Brian Epstein's father. programme.title: Four in a Bed

Jacqui and Jane from the Oak Tree Cottage want to find out why Norman and Lorraine wouldn't return, while Martin and Catherine from the Busfeild Arms have some explaining to do when it comes to their profit margins. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: PR manager Emmy Webster kicks off a week of dinner parties in Yeovil, Somerset, where she hopes her locally sourced produce will impress her guests - self-proclaimed 'country bumpkin' Mel Dunford, used-car salesman Andy Neil, radio broadcaster Steve Carpenter and businessman Alan Bunter - and make her an early contender for the £1,000 prize. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Steve Carpenter hosts the second dinner party in Yeovil, Somerset, hoping his country-style cooking and carefully sourced ingredients will win him the £1,000 cash prize. However, the entertainer lets his focus slip when he allows an unwanted ingredient onto one plate(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

With an exotic menu - including duck vindaloo, which is her own invention - Mel hopes to prove her doubters wrong. And it's not just her surprise culinary skills that wow her guests - she also breaks into song, leaving everyone astounded(n)

As the ladies at the table struggle to get a word in, the menu of rotten beans, tofu cheesecake and soggy noodles fails to impress(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

Six amuse-bouches for his starter are a visual and culinary treat, but his constant questions and need for feedback and praise threaten to put off his fellow diners. programme.title: 999: On the Frontline
programme.desc: Birmingham paramedics try to figure out if a collapsed office worker is having a stroke, while Coventry-based paramedics have the same dilemma with a 76-year-old woman(n)

programme.desc: Cora, 62, arrives by air ambulance following a high-speed road accident, which left her trapped in the car for more than an hour. Scott, 23, has badly cut his knee after a night out, and while he's being treated, he reflects on his schizophrenia diagnosis as a teenager. programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

Plus, 76-year-old Margaret is brought in to St George's after suffering a suspected stroke during a routine appointment at another hospital, and the doctors must quickly administer a clot-busting drug if they are to prevent further damage to her brain(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The priest makes a valiant effort to give up cigarettes for Lent, inspired by a challenge from Dick Byrne, his opposite number over on Rugged Island, but soon finds he is not cut out for a life of self-denial. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Father Jack is hauled off to the local old priests' home to be treated for a strange medical complaint. He is replaced by a younger man - who proceeds to drive everyone crazy by playing jungle music at ear-splitting volume for hours on end. Dermot Morgan and Frank Kelly star(n)

programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers game, with team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson joined by guests David Baddiel and Trevor Noah. programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Comedian and actor Billy Connolly sets out to fill in the gaps in his own family history. Starting in Glasgow, the city of Billy's birth, he hopes to find out more about his mother's relatives. He believes they hailed from Ireland, but records concerning his great-great-grandmother only deepen the mystery. Billy also heads to India, where he unearths details of the parts two of his ancestors played in historical events(n)

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Four decades ago, Neasden-born model and actress Twiggy, then known as Lesley Hornby, found her life transformed when a reporter spotted her photo on the wall of a London hairdresser, and she was dubbed the 'face of the 60s'. Suddenly the 16-year-old was catapulted into life as a supermodel, travelling the world, mixing with some of its biggest stars and eventually appearing in films such as The Boyfriend and The Blues Brothers. In the 100th episode of the genealogy show, Twiggy examines her family's past, where she discovers a history involving strong women and a hint of crime(n)

programme.title: Time Team Specials
programme.desc: Tony Robinson and the team dig at the site of New Place, the home of William Shakespeare in Stratford-upon-Avon. The archaeologists hope to reveal that the house was once one of the largest in the area, with 20 rooms and a dozen servants, and explain why the Bard wanted such a grand place, and where he got the money to pay for it(n)

programme.title: Time Team Specials

programme.desc: Debt collector Eleri Watson hosts the fourth dinner party in Co Durham and Wearside. However, her efforts to organise an all-Welsh evening do not go according to plan when soil is found in the leek soup and lamb is served burned, dampening the guests' enthusiasm(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Kent, Katie is first up with a menu suited to her husband Dan's huge appetite, but their massive portion sizes prove a challenge to some. programme.title: Undercover Boss USA

programme.desc: The chairman and CEO of a New Jersey-based company providing chauffeured luxury transportation goes to work among his own staff by posing as a contestant in a reality show. programme.desc: The chef visits beachside restaurant Barefoot Bob's in Hull, Massachusetts, owned by husband-and-wife team Marc and Lisa. With the restaurant and marriage on the line, Gordon tries to help turn things around before it's too late(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Mojito, a Cuban cafe in Brooklyn, New York. The restaurant was the shared dream of two newlyweds who have separated since its opening, and whose constant public quarrelling is distracting staff and driving customers away(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Flamangos restaurant in Whitehouse, New Jersey, where he tries to help the mother-and-daughter owners turn around their struggling business's fortunes. programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarella's in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leone's in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant(n)

programme.desc: When a media mogul's wife is driven off the road and into a river, the investigation unearths a secret in an old and supposedly closed case. The team investigates a possible revenge attack, and as the woman's husband made plenty of enemies, there is no shortage of suspects(n)

programme.title: Bull

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the attempted murder of a tough judge, but when the culprit is found Carmichael and McCoy have a difficult time building a case. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach, Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the death of a woman killed in what appears to be a road rage incident. However, as they retrace her last actions, they suspect she was accidentally murdered by an assassin following the wrong car. The intended victim turns out to be a reporter claiming to have uncovered a plot to rig an election by a senator, who Briscoe suspects of having connections with the Mafia(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Fontana and Green investigate the murders of a group of heroin users in a raid on a drug den. The prime suspect is a warlord who aided American forces in Afghanistan and claims diplomatic immunity - but McCoy and Southerlyn refuse to be swayed in their attempts to prosecute. Drama, starring Dennis Farina, Jesse L Martin, Sam Waterston and Elisabeth Rohm(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a publishing executive last seen engaged in a heated argument over a taxi. They learn that the killing may have been a race hate crime, with their main suspect having a long history of prejudice. However, a technicality arises in the case, threatening to deny them the conviction. Starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team suspects Gibbs's arch-nemesis is behind an explosion at a summit on global terror. Meanwhile, a grief-stricken Fornell struggles to deal with the fatal shooting of his ex-wife. American drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Pauley Perrette and Joe Spano(n)

programme.title: Perception

Crime drama, guest starring Harry Connick Jr, with Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson's estranged half-brother shows up in New York asking for her help because Child Services is threatening to take his children away from him. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, Judge Gary Feldman discovers that McCoy and Ross have indicted an innocent man on charges of rape following an attack on a girl in Harlem. programme.desc: The case against Greek artefact smuggler Sebastian Diakos is reopened, and Stella learns her old mentor Professor Papakota has been implicated. Visiting Greece to continue her inquiries, she is unprepared for the connection she finds between Papakota and her birth mother. Gary Sinise and Melina Kanakaredes star(n)

However, Columbo sees through his hi-tech ruse and tries to expose the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Oskar Werner and Gena Rowlands(n)

programme.desc: The bodies of five people, all of whom are identified as being from the US Navy, are found on the floor of a diner, and all are connected to a suspicious tax firm that specialises in helping people who are in arrears. When further killings are linked to the business, the team realises the crime seem to be copycats of previous cases. Meanwhile, two of Gibbs' ex-wives appear at the location with something important to discuss with the agent. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: American social worker Sarah Goode is taken hostage by militants in northern Syria, and thanks to the efforts of the Navy Seals, is eventually returned home unharmed. Evidence from the incident suggests US citizen Kyle Nasry was connected to the kidnapping, but when the agents trace Nasry to a rally held by a controversial imam, they are surprised to find Sarah among the attendees. Meanwhile, DiNozzo finally takes his relationship with Zoe Keates public - surprising none of his colleagues. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and his colleagues investigate when Eric Kutzler, the first openly gay Navy lieutenant tipped to receive the Medal of Honour, is murdered. While the agents initially suspect Kutzler's death was the result of a hate crime, the fact that his police officer husband waited 20 minutes to report the crime suggests he had something to hide. Meanwhile, the team throws a baby shower for Palmer as his wife's due date approaches. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.desc: Cragen goes undercover when a murder in Brighton Beach leads the team to a thriving mail-order bride business, and hopes to hunt down the killer. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Meet the Trumps: From Immigrant to President
programme.desc: Donald Trump is the 45th President of the United States and commander in chief of America's armed forces, the most powerful position in the world. This documentary goes back to his roots, to reveal the story of his family. It reveals how Trump's penniless German grandfather arrived in America in the 1880s, and ended up running bars and brothels in the gold rush. And how his Scottish mother travelled from the Outer Hebrides to New York and worked as a maid before marrying Donald's tycoon father(n)

programme.title: The English Teacher (2013)
programme.desc: A teacher is reunited with her favourite past pupil, who has returned from New York having failed to succeed as a playwright and under pressure from his family to get a job. She puts her reputation on the line to prove her protege has talent by getting the school to put on a production of his play. Comedy drama, starring Julianne Moore, Michael Angarano and Greg Kinnear(n)

programme.title: Strangerland (2015)
programme.desc: A couple move to a remote town in the Australian Outback, but their new life takes a tragic turn when their teenage children disappear during a dust storm. programme.title: How Safe Are My Drugs?
programme.desc: Radio 1 presenter B Traits meets drug users and dealers in Britain and Ibiza to find out how much they really know about the substances. programme.title: How Safe Are My Drugs?
programme.desc: Radio 1 presenter B Traits meets drug users and dealers in Britain and Ibiza to find out how much they really know about the substances. After a decade performing in some of the biggest clubs in the world, she worries that many people have no idea what they are taking, and she explores why drug-related deaths in the UK have recently increased(n)

programme.title: Jack Mulligan
programme.desc: Haunted by the ghosts of his past, former criminal Jack Mulligan returns to his old West London neighbourhood for the first time in ten years to seek revenge on his old gang boss Jimmy Callinan.(n)

programme.title: My Name Is Lenny (2017)
programme.desc: Biopic of bare-knuckle fighter Lenny McLean, exploring his troubled upbringing and early days in the unlicensed boxing world, and his career-long rivalry with fellow fighter Roy Shaw. Starring Josh Helman, Michael Bisping and John Hurt in one of his final roles(n)

programme.title: The Harder They Come (1973)
programme.desc: A naive young man from rural Jamaica heads for Kingston in search of reggae stardom, only to get involved in the shady world of drug dealing as his musical career takes off. With no other option but to go on the run, he fights back against the system which forced him into a life of crime and becomes a political hero in the process. Crime drama, starring Jimmy Cliff, Janet Barkley, Carl Bradshaw and Bob Charlton(n)

programme.title: Food Junkies
programme.desc: The Dumpling Sisters share their favourite moments from the series(n)

programme.title: Food Junkies
programme.desc: The Dumpling Sisters make sizzling beef, DJ BBQ looks for London's best chilli and Spazia is back with her punny sandwiches(n)

programme.title: News Rewind
programme.desc: A digest of news and events from across London from the past few days.(n)

programme.title: Talking Points
programme.desc: Interviews on news and events from across London.(n)

programme.title: King Alfred and the Anglo-Saxons
programme.desc: Michael Wood explores the role played by Alfred the Great's daughter Aethelflaed in England's battles in civil war and against the Vikings. The presenter contemplates how England 'may never have happened' without the young ruler of Mercia, who led armies, built fortresses, was a skilled diplomat in campaigning against the Norse invaders, and became a beloved leader in the British Isles(n)

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: Individuals take up the challenge to reinvent themselves completely(n)

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: Individuals take up the challenge to reinvent themselves completely(n)

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: Observational documentary revealing the inner workings of Oxford Street, following police and paramedics as they keep the public safe, as well as the staff in the shops and on the underground(n)

programme.title: Saturday Night Out (1963)
programme.desc: Five sailors spend their overnight leave in London, where they get involved with a variety of unusual characters. Drama, starring Bernard Lee, Heather Sears and John Bonney(n)

programme.title: Royally Mad
programme.desc: American fans of the royal family take a trip round London in the run-up to Prince William and Kate Middleton's wedding(n)

programme.title: Cone of Silence (1961)
programme.desc: A flying instructor investigates a series of mysterious aircraft accidents blamed on one pilot and finds evidence which may clear the unfortunate suspect's name. Drama, starring Peter Cushing, Michael Craig, Elizabeth Seal and George Sanders(n)

programme.title: The Wind Cannot Read (1958)
programme.desc: A British flying officer marries a Japanese woman during the Second World War, but is devastated to discover she is suffering from an incurable brain disease. Romance, starring Dirk Bogarde, Yoko Tani, Ronald Lewis and John Fraser(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A property expert offers advice to British householders aiming to buy a second home abroad(n)

programme.title: Capital Conversation
programme.desc: Revealing the secrets of what it takes to be the best in business today. Author and entrepreneur Michael Hayman interviews the business leaders at the heart of London's most exciting success stories.(n)

programme.title: Spotlight London
programme.desc: Interviews about arts and events showcasing London's vibrant culture scene.(n)

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: Observational documentary revealing the inner workings of Oxford Street, following police and paramedics as they keep the public safe, as well as the staff in the shops and on the underground(n)

programme.title: Royal Wives at War
programme.desc: A revealing look at the abdication crisis of 1936, through the eyes of the two women at its very heart. In a number of dramatised monologues set in 1967, Elizabeth the Queen Mother (Emma Davies) and Wallis Simpson (Gina McKee) look back at the dramatic events that led to King Edward VIII giving up the throne for the woman he loved. With Nick Waring, John Sackville and Emma Campbell-Jones, and featuring contributors including Lady Colin Campbell, Andrew Morton and John Julius Norwich(n)

programme.title: Storyville
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the private life of former Libyan dictator Colonel Muammar Muhammad Abu Minyar al-Gaddafi, revealing his disturbing abuses of power. Filmed across the Pacific, Cuba, Brazil, the US, South Africa and Australia, the programme also considers how Libya's vast oil reserves were a key reason why the 'mad dog', as President Reagan dubbed him, managed to maintain such a strong alliance with the West prior to the Arab Spring that cemented his demise at home and led to his overthrow and death in 2011(n)

programme.title: We Still Steal the Old Way (2017)
programme.desc: After their exploits in We Still Kill the Old Way, criminal outfit the Archer Gang encounters an old enemy when a daring heist ends with them behind bars, however that doesn't stop them attempting to break out an old friend. Prison drama, starring Ian Ogilvy, Billy Murray, Julian Glover and Lysette Anthony(n)
